rulings.Case Title: VICTOR TUNG VS. AMI QI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion For Protective Order And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 29, 2015 line 2. PLAINTIFF VICTOR TUNG's Motion For Protective Order And For Sanctions Hearing Required. Parties are ordered to appear at 9:00 a.m. to engage in meaningful meet and confer efforts. Parties are to report to the Court of their progress at 9:30 a.m. Unauthorized supplemental filings (May 20 and May 22, 2015) are stricken. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARTINA M. IBARRA et al VS. 39-41 LAKE STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Amend The Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 29, 2015 line 3. PLAINTIFFS MARTINA IBARRA and CRISOSTOMO IBARRA's Motion To Amend The Second Amended Complaint Transferred to department 302 to be heard on June 11, 2015. Moving party shall provide courtesy copies of the moving papers to department 302 no later than June 1, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date and place. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SANJEEV RAI DBA IMPRINT CP VS. MARK GIN DBA COPY EDGE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-15-651964 WITH CASE CGC-14-542362
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 29, 2015 line 4. PLAINTIFF SANJEEV RAI DBA IMPRINT CP's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-15-651964 WITH CASE CGC-14-542362 DENIED. Authorities cited by the moving party are not on point and the burden for consolidation is not met. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KEVIN COCHRANE VS. VLADIMIR FEDEROV ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of General And Special Demurrer To First Amended Complaint For Partition Of Real Property, Intentional Infliction Of Emotional Distress, And Injury To Personal Property
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 29, 2015 line 5. DEFENDANTS VLADIMIR FEDEROV and GALINA FEDEROVA's General And Special Demurrer To First Amended Complaint For Partition Of Real Property, Intentional Infliction Of Emotional Distress, And Injury To Personal Property SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege each cause of action separately. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOAN KONG VS. MICHAEL COMERFORD ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 29, 2015 line 6. DEFENDANT MICHAEL COMERFORD's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to June 12, 2015. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than June 5, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CALVIN TRAN VS. MALLORY BARGER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 29, 2015 line 7. DEFENDANT MALLORY BARGER's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges cause of action for unlawful detainer based on owner move-in. = (501/REQ)
